A.8.15_logging.description: Event logs recording user activities, exceptions, faults and information security events shall be produced, stored, protected and analysed
A.8.15_logging.implementation: Every AI agent action is captured as a structured event, hashed into an HMAC-SHA256 chain, and stored with full provenance

A.8.16_monitoring.description: Networks, systems and applications shall be monitored for anomalous behaviour
A.8.16_monitoring.implementation: Three-layer monitoring: eBPF kernel observation, OPA policy evaluation, Z3 formal verification

layers.L3_prove: Z3 SMT solver, 135 test cases, 100% accuracy

A.5.23_cloud_security.description: Processes for acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services shall be established
A.5.23_cloud_security.implementation: Agent workspace boundary enforcement — file writes restricted to /workspace/ and /tmp/, system paths blocked, network connections to suspicious ports blocked
